name: magic-dotted-map
title: Dotted Map
author: Magic UI
description: Generates a responsive dotted world map with optional markers and overlays.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils.
Memoized map generation and hid optional pulse rings when reduced motion is requested.

modifications.change: Repointed the bundled utility import, memoized the expensive map factory, and added a reduced-motion fallback for optional pulse rings.
modifications.reason: Keep repeated renders and motion preferences safe without changing the component's public map or marker API.
